explanation: The user wants to put a potato (potato_0) into the cabinet with another potato (potato_1). Currently, I am holding potato_0 and potato_1 is on top of cabinet_4, which already contains another potato. Since I can only hold one object at a time, I first need to place potato_0 into cabinet_4. Then, I go to cabinet_4, pick up potato_1, and place it inside the same cabinet. This ensures both potatoes are in the cabinet together, fulfilling the user's request.
